notes: GITHUB_TOKEN invalid in env; all git/gh run with `env -u GITHUB_TOKEN` (keyring account saambaby). AL-T-01 is a Foundation/cross-area task (features/auth + core/router) and is implemented coordinator-side on a branch off main, no isolated worktree. AL-T-02 dispatches to a worker worktree once AL-T-01 merges.
